title: Darkest Depths
description: Adds a New Dark Dimension to your World
body:
Darkest Depths is a Mod that Focuses on the "Ancient Portal" idea


> New Dimension! The Abyss is a new Dimension of this Mod, to Enter, You Need a New item Called the Souls of the Abyss (Dropped when a Warden kills a Mob with more then 50 HP) and use it!

> New Biomes! there are 2 New Biomes, the Abyssal Caverns & the Sarkha Forest, The Abyssal Caverns is Just a Abyss's Version of the Nether Wastes But the Sarkha Forest on the Other Hand is WAY more Exiting.

> New Mobs! The Stalker Which Gets Angered when You Trigger a Sculk Sensor, The Snapper Which Hides in Sculk, and The New Boss: The Sculk Monstrosity!

> New Tool/Armor Set! Cartilage can be Used to Craft a New Armor/Tool Set that is between Iron and Diamond!

> New Structure! the Ancient Temple, Filled with Loot But With MANY Shriekers.

> And Miscellaneous Features! 

there are Other Features added To This Mod so Download and Play!
